results.description: Hook fires only on multi-scope signals (not on single-ticket Agent calls)
Every intervention logged with trigger reason and outcome
results.evidence: pre_tool_use_dispatch_mode_guardrail.py:_log_intervention writes NDJSON to $ONEX_STATE_DIR/dispatch-guardrail-log.ndjson; verified by test_three_tickets_triggers_advisory reading the log file

results.description: Override rate measurable from log data
results.evidence: Log entries include trigger_signals[] and agent_response field; rate = count(agent_response=proceeded) / count(*) per time window

results.description: No false positives on single-ticket work, Explore agents, research agents
Hook can be disabled per-session via env var
